tab.avatarComingSoon.message: Avatar (Face + Voice Synthesis Video) Coming Soon, Stay Tuned
tab.avatarComingSoon.description: Tooltip description for disabled Avatar Tab

name.motionImage.description: Input for character image in Motion Control

name.motionVideo.description: Input for reference video in Motion Control

description.motionImage.message: Upload a character reference image; elements like character and background in the generated video will reference this.

description.motionVideo.message: Upload a motion reference video; the character's actions in the generated video will match this video (MP4 / MOV, ≤1 minute, ≤1 GB).

description.motionPrompt.message: Optional. Can include positive and negative descriptions to assist in generating effects.

description.characterOrientation.message: Choosing 'Follow Video' performs better for complex actions; choosing 'Follow Image' aligns character orientation with the reference image, improving camera movement.

description.motionMode.message: std prioritizes performance, pro prioritizes quality.

description.keepOriginalSound.message: If enabled, retains the original audio from the reference video; if disabled, the output video will not include the original audio.

placeholder.motionPrompt.message: For example: A person is jumping. Optional.

button.generateMotion.description: Button to generate in Motion Control

message.motionMissingInputs.message: Please upload both character image and motion reference video.
message.motionMissingInputs.description: Prompt when inputs are missing in Motion Control

inspiration.removeChip.description: aria-label for the remove button on a selected-preset pill

inspiration.hint.message: Click phrases to automatically add to prompts; click again to remove.
inspiration.hint.description: Usage instructions at the top of Inspiration drawer

inspiration.clearSelected.description: Button to clear all selected presets

name.type.description: The content type of the Kling video to be generated, such as 'link', 'text', etc.

name.modePro.description: High quality mode for Kling video (outputs 1080p)

name.mode4k.description: Kling 4K mode (supported only by v3 / v3-Omni)

name.cameraControl.description: Type and parameters of camera control

name.cameraTypeDownBack.description: Preset camera movement: down and back

name.cameraTypeForwardUp.description: Preset camera movement: forward and up

name.cameraTypeLeftTurnForward.description: Preset camera movement: left turn and forward

name.cameraTypeRightTurnForward.description: Preset camera movement: right turn and forward

name.failure.description: The failure status of the task

name.failureReason.description: The reason for the task's failure

name.traceId.description: The trace ID of the task

name.createdAt.description: The date and time the Kling video was generated

name.cfgScale.description: The freedom level parameter for generating the video (0-1), larger values are closer to the reference

name.generateAudio.description: Whether to generate audio sync, supports kling-v3, kling-v3-omni, and kling-v2-6 (pro mode)

name.startImage.description: Form field label: first frame reference image

name.negativePrompt.description: Negative text prompt for generating the video

name.endImage.description: Form field label: last frame reference image

name.model.description: The model version used to generate the video

name.ratio.description: The video ratio used to generate the video

name.mode.description: The mode used to generate the video

name.effect.description: Name of the style parameter used to switch between different versions or styles of the model

name.ingredientsModel.description: The model version used to generate the video

name.klingBot.description: Name of the Kling video generator

description.ingredients.message: Enable this button if you want to upload multiple images to generate your video.

description.imageUrl.message: In the task of creating a video from multiple images, multiple images must be uploaded.

description.prompt.message: Prompt words for generating Kling videos

description.negativePrompt.message: Negative text prompt, optional, must not exceed 200 characters

description.uploadStartImage.message: Upload the first frame image as a reference for generation; the final video will reference the first frame.
description.uploadStartImage.description: Description of the upload reference parameter

description.uploadEndImage.message: Upload the last frame image as a reference for generation; the final video will reference the last frame.
description.uploadEndImage.description: Description of the upload reference parameter

description.cfgScale.message: Degree of freedom for generating the video, optional [0,1]. The larger the value, the stronger the correlation.
description.cfgScale.description: Description of the upload reference parameter

description.mode.message: std has better performance, pro has better quality; 4K is only supported by v3 / v3-Omni and cannot be used with camera control simultaneously.
description.mode.description: Overall description of the mode field

description.mode4kRequiresV3.description: Reason for 4K option being disabled (model mismatch)

description.mode4kIncompatibleCamera.message: Camera control is enabled and cannot be used with 4K simultaneously.
description.mode4kIncompatibleCamera.description: Reason for 4K option being disabled (camera control set)

description.duration.message: Standard model only supports 5/10 seconds; v3 / v3-Omni supports 3/5/8/10/12/15 seconds
description.duration.description: Overall description of the duration field

description.durationV3Only.description: Reason for duration option being disabled

description.generateAudio.message: Synthesize sound effects while generating the video. Only kling-v3 / kling-v3-omni / kling-v2-6 (pro mode) is supported.
description.generateAudio.description: Description of the audio effect switch (enabled)

description.generateAudioUnsupported.message: The current model does not support synchronized sound effects; only kling-v3 / kling-v3-omni / kling-v2-6 (pro mode) is available.
description.generateAudioUnsupported.description: Description of the audio effect switch (disabled)

description.cameraControl.message: Control the direction of camera movement. Selecting 'Custom' allows fine-tuning across 6 dimensions, each value [-1, 1].

description.cameraControlDisabled4k.message: 4K mode is selected, camera control is unavailable; please switch to std / pro and then enable.
description.cameraControlDisabled4k.description: Reason for camera control being disabled

placeholder.select.description: Placeholder text in the selection field

placeholder.prompt.message: Enter prompt words for the video style, e.g., moving
placeholder.prompt.description: Placeholder text in the prompt field

placeholder.negativePrompt.message: Enter negative prompt words for the video style, up to 200 characters
placeholder.negativePrompt.description: Placeholder text in the negative prompt field

button.precise.description: Button text for generating Kling videos

button.creative.description: Button text for generating Kling videos

button.generate.description: Button text for generating Kling videos

button.extend.description: Text for the button that allows the user to extend the video

button.download.description: Text for the button to download the video

button.uploadImageUrl.description: Text for the button to upload an image (simplified to 'Upload', do not use 'Upload Image')

button.uploadVideoUrl.description: Text for the button to upload a video

button.uploadReferences.description: Text for the button that allows users to upload references

message.uploadReferencesExceed.message: You can upload a maximum of 1 image
message.uploadReferencesExceed.description: Error message when the number of uploaded images exceeds the limit

message.uploadReferencesSuccess.description: Success message when an image is uploaded successfully

message.uploadReferencesError.message: Image upload failed, please try again later
message.uploadReferencesError.description: Error message when image upload fails

message.endImageRequiresStart.message: Please upload the first frame reference image before using the end frame reference image
message.endImageRequiresStart.description: Error message when the user has only uploaded the end frame without the first frame

message.endImageNotSupported.message: The current model/mode/duration does not support an end-frame reference image. Adjust the configuration first (typically: mode pro, duration 5s).
message.endImageNotSupported.description: Shown when uploading an end frame to a model that does not support it

message.featureNotSupportedTitle.description: Title of the confirm dialog when switching parameters drops existing settings

message.featureNotSupportedBody.message: The new selection does not support the following enabled settings: {fields}. Continuing will clear them.
message.featureNotSupportedBody.description: Body of the confirm dialog; {fields} is replaced with a comma-separated list of field names

message.featureRemovedNotice.description: Toast shown after the user confirms the switch

button.confirmContinue.description: Primary button on the feature-removal confirm dialog

button.cancelSwitch.description: Cancel button on the feature-removal confirm dialog

message.startingTask.description: Message when the drawing task begins

message.startTaskSuccess.description: Success message when the task is successfully started

message.startTaskFailed.message: Failed to initiate task, please contact the administrator
message.startTaskFailed.description: Error message when starting the drawing task fails

message.usedUp.message: Your credits are exhausted, please purchase more credits to continue
message.usedUp.description: Message when credits are used up

message.generating.description: Message when the image is being generated

message.downloadVideo.description: Message when the image is being generated

message.extendVideo.description: Message when the image is being generated

message.uploadVideoExceed.message: The number of first frame images uploaded exceeds the limit
message.uploadVideoExceed.description: Error message when the number of first frame images uploaded exceeds the limit

message.uploadVideoSizeExceed.description: Error message when the uploaded file size exceeds 10MB!

message.uploadVideoTypeFailed.message: Uploaded file must be in MP4 format!
message.uploadVideoTypeFailed.description: Error message when the uploaded file is not in MP4 format!

message.uploadStartImageExceed.message: The number of first frame images uploaded exceeds the limit
message.uploadStartImageExceed.description: Error message when the number of first frame images uploaded exceeds the limit

message.uploadEndImageExceed.message: The number of end frame images uploaded exceeds the limit
message.uploadEndImageExceed.description: Error message when the number of end frame images uploaded exceeds the limit

message.uploadStartImageError.message: Failed to upload first frame image
message.uploadStartImageError.description: Error message when uploading the first frame image fails

message.uploadVideoError.description: Error message when uploading the first frame image fails

message.uploadEndImageError.message: Failed to upload end frame image
message.uploadEndImageError.description: Error message when uploading the end frame image fails

message.uploadDocumentsError.description: Error message when uploading a document fails

message.noOperations.description: Message when there are no available operations

message.noTasks.message: No historical tasks, please click on the left to generate a video
message.noTasks.description: Message when there are no tasks
